description_long: This is a modern suburban house with a dark gable roof and light-colored exterior walls, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped yard. The front features a covered porch with columns, a central entry door, and a single-car garage to the right. The backyard includes a patio area with a pergola, a small round pool, and a row of tall shrubs for privacy. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with dormer windows on the upper level and large rectangular windows on the ground floor. The property is landscaped with grass, flower beds, and several trees, providing a welcoming and private environment. The overall design blends traditional and contemporary elements, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A modern suburban house with a dark gable roof, light walls, covered porch, garage, landscaped yard, and a backyard patio with a pergola and pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, garage, driveway, and landscaped garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, wooden fence, backyard patio with pergola, and small pool.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio area, pergola, pool, and privacy shrubs along the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, windows, and additional landscaping with trees and grass.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormer and large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and a single main door
